_sourcing_note: Official brand/directory sites (ta-petro.com, truckstopsandservices.com, findtruckservice.com, hoteltruckparking.com, truckparkingclub.com, catscale.com, iexitapp.com) were blocked at the organization egress gateway (HTTP 403 on every direct WebFetch), consistent with prior segments. Per instructions, official brand URLs that appeared verbatim in search results are recorded as canonical websites, and every published facility is corroborated by 2+ independent search sources. No field was guessed; unconfirmed values were left blank. This segment (I-65 TN exits ~53-74: Spring Hill/Thompson's Station approach, Franklin, Cool Springs, Brentwood, south Nashville/Harding Place, Williamson/Davidson County) is an affluent suburban corridor; the only dedicated freight facility found in range is TA Franklin at Exit 61. All existing production TN listings are on the I-75 East Tennessee corridor and none overlap this I-65 segment.

listings.name: TA Franklin (TravelCenters of America #157)
listings.description: Full-service TravelCenters of America truck stop (#157) at I-65 Exit 61 (Peytonsville Rd / Goose Creek Bypass) on the south Franklin approach, Williamson County. Reported: 7 fuel lanes, 24-hour BP diesel, 74 truck parking spaces, 6 showers, on-site CAT Scale, TA Truck Service (2 repair bays), Country Pride restaurant, bulk DEF, ATM, laundry. Open 24 hours.
listings.corroboration: TA official location page (TA Franklin) + truckstopsandservices (Travel Centers of America #157, I-65 Exit 61) + iExit (TA Travel Center, Exit 61) + Find Truck Service (#157) + TruckMap all agree on brand, 4400 Peytonsville Road Franklin 37064, exit 61, phone 615-794-8406, 74 spaces, 6 showers, 7 fuel lanes, CAT Scale and TA Truck Service on site.

listings.name: CAT Scale - TA Franklin #157
listings.description: CAT Scale located at TA Franklin (TravelCenters of America #157), I-65 Exit 61 (Peytonsville Rd), Williamson County.
listings.corroboration: TA Franklin #157 amenity list (truckstopsandservices, I-65 Exit 61) and Find Truck Service both explicitly list a CAT Scale on site; corroborated by the allstays Tennessee CAT Scale directory. CAT Scale official locator (catscale.com) was blocked at the egress gateway.

listings.name: TA Truck Service - TA Franklin #157
listings.description: TA Truck Service commercial repair shop co-located at TA Franklin (#157), I-65 Exit 61, Williamson County. Two service bays offering tire repair/replacement, brakes, electrical, DOT inspections, diagnostics, HVAC, trailer and aftertreatment work; 24/7 roadside via RoadSquad.
listings.corroboration: Find Truck Service (TA Truck Service #157, Franklin) + TA Truck Service Franklin TN Facebook page + 4RoadService (TA Franklin) all confirm an on-site TA Truck Service repair shop with 2 bays offering tires and heavy-truck repair at 4400 Peytonsville Rd, I-65 Exit 61.

excluded.name: Love's Travel Stop (I-65 Exit 46)
excluded.reason: Exit 46 is south of this segment's range (exits 53-74); belongs to the Maury County / southern I-65 segment, not the Franklin/Brentwood segment.

excluded.name: Love's Travel Stop #629 (I-65 Exit 108)
excluded.reason: Exit 108 is far north of range (Robertson/Sumner County, north Nashville metro); outside exits 53-74.

excluded.name: Blue Beacon Truck Wash (I-65 Exit 81 and Exit 95)
excluded.reason: Both Blue Beacon I-65 locations are north of range (exits 81 and 95, north Nashville metro); outside exits 53-74.

excluded.name: Blue Beacon Truck Wash - Antioch
excluded.reason: 611 Muci Dr serves I-24, not I-65; outside this I-65 segment.

excluded.name: Tennessee Weigh Station - I-65 (THP District 7 Scale House)
excluded.reason: Located at I-65 mile marker 55 near the Alabama line; outside this segment's geographic range and belongs to the southern I-65 TN segment.

excluded.name: Tennessee Weigh Station - I-65 (THP District 3 Scale House)
excluded.reason: Located at I-65 mile marker 119 north of Nashville; outside exits 53-74. No permanent weigh/scale complex exists on I-65 in Williamson/Davidson County per TDOT/THP.

excluded.name: Truck Parking Club - Franklin
excluded.reason: TruckParkingClub advertises Franklin-area listings, but specific facility name/street address, space count, and I-65 proximity could not be independently confirmed (site blocked at egress gateway; no address in search snippets). Held to avoid guessing address.

excluded.name: Truck Parking Club - Spring Hill
excluded.reason: TruckParkingClub advertises Spring Hill listings, but no specific verifiable address/space count could be confirmed; site blocked at egress gateway. Held to avoid guessing.

excluded.name: Cool Springs / Brentwood hotels (Drury, Marriott, Residence Inn, Comfort Inn, etc.)
excluded.reason: Upscale business/extended-stay hotels near Cool Springs; several charge for standard car parking and none could be independently confirmed to permit overnight semi/truck parking. Category-fit not confirmed; excluded rather than guess truck access.
